news.t: Inspire's Founding Faith-Based ETFs Celebrate 7 Years of Trading
Inspire ETFs Reports Expense Ratio Reductions for 7 Funds
Inspire Investing's Founding Biblical ESG ETFs Celebrate 5 Years of Trading

holdings.infoBox: BLES is an equity ETF with a total of 422 individual holdings. The top holdings are Cash & Cash Equivalents stock at 1.01%, Marvell Technology at 0.71%, STMicroelectronics at 0.55%, Semtech at 0.53%, and Western Digital at 0.50%.

overview.description: The Inspire Global Hope ETF (BLES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund follows an equal-weighted index of 400 large-cap stocks selected for their alignment with the Issuer's biblical values. BLES was launched on Feb 28, 2017 and is issued by Inspire.
infoTable: Inspire Global Hope Large Cap Equal Weight Index
